title: Rich Creamy Rich Pork Stir-fry
description: An earthy and comforting Uruguayan dish featuring pork that has been caramelized to perfection, ideal for a high-protein-friendly meal.
instructions: Slice the pork tenderloin into thin strips.
In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic and sauté until translucent.
Add tomato paste, stir for another minute until fragrant. Season with salt, pepper, bay leaves, cayenne pepper (if using), and heavy cream. Mix well.
Place pork strips on top of the tomato mixture in the skillet. Cook for 10 minutes without lifting.
Once browned, cover with a lid or aluminum foil to keep warm while you prepare the sauce. Remove pork and set aside.
In another pan, melt butter over medium heat. Add heavy cream and stir until it starts to simmer. Lower the flame to low-medium.
Add basil leaves when the sauce is almost thickened (about 1-2 minutes). Stir well and serve with the cooked pork strips in a generous amount of sauce.
Garnish with fresh herbs like parsley or cilantro if desired.
